description: Schema for per-snapshot graph analysis packets and aggregates

top_level.generated_at: string (ISO 8601 datetime) — when the packet was generated
top_level.source_snapshot: string — relative path to the reduced snapshot file from project root
top_level.per_snapshot: array of packet_schema objects — one per snapshot
top_level.per_repo: object — keys are repo names, values are { node_count, total_connections, top_node: { id, title, connectionCount }, top_cc }
top_level.per_status: object — keys: verified, unverified, conflicted, quarantined with integer counts
top_level.per_contradiction: array of { id, title, contradictionCount, tags, category, repo, status } — nodes with contradictionCount > 0

identity.filters: object with filter parameters (may be empty if none applied)

top_nodes.by_connection_count: array of {id, title, repo, connectionCount, status}
top_nodes.by_verification_count: array of {id, title, repo, verificationCount, status}
top_nodes.by_authority_depth: array of {id, title, repo, authorityDepth, governanceLayer}

packet_schema.anomalies: array of strings from predefined set: zero_edges_filtered_view, counter_mismatch, conflicted_nodes_present, quarantined_nodes_present, many_unverified_nodes

claim_status.known_bugs: array of { id, description, affected_nodes, detected_in } — confirmed bugs awaiting fix
claim_status.fixes_in_progress: array of { id, description, status } — fixes implemented but pending verification
claim_status.accepted_fixes: array of { id, description, verified_at } — fixes verified and accepted

packet_schema.interpretation: string — human-readable summary of the snapshot
packet_schema.next_checks: array of string — recommended next verification steps

validation_rules: visible_nodes must equal sum of status counts (verified+unverified+conflicted+quarantined) unless some nodes are hidden by filter
snapshot_id must be unique across all packets
top_nodes arrays must be sorted descending by their respective metric
anomalies must be from the predefined set
claim_status entries must have unique id within their array
a claim_status item should not appear in both known_bugs and fixes_in_progress for the same issue
